title: Copy and Pasting multiple emails from and email column
excerpt:
Hi there 
Is there a way to be able to copy multiple emails at once in monday. We are trying to email multiple people and would prefer not to copy and paste them individually. Or is there a way that we can do this inside…

posts.author: Ryde.Garnish (Harry)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there
Is there a way to be able to copy multiple emails at once in monday. We are trying to email multiple people and would prefer not to copy and paste them individually. Or is there a way that we can do this inside monday. Quite new to this so am unsure

Thanks for any help in advance!

posts.author: vmccoy (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
2026 and this is still not a feature.

This is sorely needed, we send emails to various “mini groups” to book meetings or to follow up… but we keep project data/people on Monday and have to email via outlook. Because the people change so often, I want to be able to select the assigned individuals from Monday and copy their emails.
